result:

      "I thought it's a completely different dish so gave them a chance. Not bad. Not the most cultured but the size shocked me. Many curry chicken, for example the one opposite in Queensway shopping centre, eat no full one. This uses the noodle bowl and had lots of tau pok and radish. The chicken, very tender, was a whole leg. Not the best but filling.",
      "This stall tries to ride on the wave of Yan Ji-style seafood soups, but don't be fooled, it's just those run-of-the-mill soups long sold at fish soup stalls. It doesn't really have the requisite ingredients too. There's meatcake, yes, but it's not as good as others. That cloudiness of the soup is only on the surface. They dare sell this from $7."
